name: 51视频 - 吃瓜爆料
desc: 全网最新吃瓜爆料与福利视频

js.category: async function getCategory(){return[{id:'wpcz',text:'今日推荐'},{id:'lpjp',text:'撸片精品'},{id:'meiridasai',text:'每日大赛'},{id:'rdsj',text:'吃瓜爆料'},{id:'lljx',text:'伦理精选'},{id:'xsxy',text:'学生校园'},{id:'tynd',text:'体育男大'},{id:'smtt',text:'色漫天堂'},{id:'whhl',text:'网红黑料'},{id:'ysyl',text:'看片娱乐'},{id:'cqdb',text:'超前点播'},{id:'qubk',text:'奇趣百科'},{id:'51yc',text:'51原创'},{id:'dyds',text:'短剧影视'}]}
js.home: async function getHome(page){try{const url=page===1?'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net':'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/page/'+page+'/';const r=await fetch(url,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const h=await r.text();const l=[];const a=/<article[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/article>/g;let m;while(m=a.exec(h)){const t=m[1];const b=t.match(/<a\s+href="([^"]+)"/);if(!b)continue;const i=b[1];const e=t.match(/<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/);if(!e)continue;const n=e[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let p='';const g=t.match(/background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)/);if(g)p=g[1];else{const q=t.match(/<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)"/);if(q)p=q[1];}l.push({vod_id:i,vod_name:n,vod_pic:p||'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png',vod_remarks:'热门爆料',vod_play_from:'51视频'});}return{page:page,pagecount:1231,list:l};}catch{return{page:page,pagecount:1,list:[]};}}
js.detail: async function getDetail(id){try{const base='https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net';const url=id.startsWith('http')?id:base+id;const r=await fetch(url,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const h=await r.text();let t='';const e=h.match(/<h1[^>]*class="post-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h1>/)||h.match(/<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/);if(e)t=e[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let p='';const g=h.match(/<meta[^>]*property="og:image"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"/)||h.match(/<img[^>]*class="post-cover"[^>]*src="([^"]+)"/);if(g)p=g[1];let v='';const a=h.match(/(https?:\/\/[^"'\s]+\.(?:mp4|m3u8|flv)[^"'\s]*)/gi);const b=h.match(/<iframe[^>]*src="([^"]+)"/i);if(a&&a.length>0)v=a[0];else if(b)v=b[1];return{vod_id:id,vod_name:t||'51视频',vod_pic:p||'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png',vod_remarks:'点击播放',vod_play_from:'51视频',vod_play_url:v?'在线播放$'+v:'在线播放$'+url,vod_content:'热门吃瓜爆料视频'};}catch{return{vod_id:id,vod_name:'51视频',vod_pic:'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png',vod_remarks:'加载失败',vod_play_from:'51视频',vod_play_url:'在线播放$'+id,vod_content:'加载失败'};}}
js.search: async function getSearch(k,p){try{const u='https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/?s='+encodeURIComponent(k);const r=await fetch(u,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const h=await r.text();const l=[];const a=/<article[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/article>/g;let m;while(m=a.exec(h)){const t=m[1];if(t.includes('post-card-ads'))continue;const b=t.match(/<a\s+href="([^"]+)"/);if(!b)continue;const i=b[1];const e=t.match(/<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/);if(!e)continue;const n=e[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let p='';const g=t.match(/background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)/);if(g)p=g[1];else{const q=t.match(/<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)"/);if(q)p=q[1];}l.push({vod_id:i,vod_name:n,vod_pic:p||'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png',vod_remarks:'搜索结果',vod_play_from:'51视频'});}return{page:1,pagecount:1,list:l};}catch{return{page:1,pagecount:1,list:[]};}}
